prompt:
Goal: Create a high-fashion editorial triptych showing the same confident adult man in three different monochrome luxury outfits and surreal themed environments, suitable for a glossy fashion campaign.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 image with three equal vertical panels separated by narrow white gutters and a clean white border around the full composition. Full-body subject in each panel, centered, standing upright and facing the camera; face softly anonymized/blurred with no recognizable identity.

Subject details: The model is a stylish adult man with short brown hair and an athletic build. He has a polished celebrity-stylist look, hands relaxed near the jacket front, wearing coordinated jewelry and watches. Use realistic proportions and premium fashion photography lighting.

Panel count and contents: Use exactly 3 vertical panels.
1. Left panel: turquoise resort look. The man wears a bright turquoise tailored suit with matching vest and patterned shirt, white pocket square, bracelets, watch, and white loafers. Environment: tropical luxury poolside scene with vivid turquoise water, palm trees, cabanas, blue sky, and a surreal translucent ice/crystal arch or frozen waterfall on the left foreground. Include a geode-like crystal opening near the water with iridescent minerals.
2. Center panel: coral-red futuristic look. The man wears a monochrome coral-red outfit: structured jacket or vest layered over a top, tailored trousers, and matching red shoes. Environment: bright minimalist white gallery or studio with glossy floor, floating red-and-white abstract ribbons, spheres, capsules, and transparent bubbles; pastel neon rectangular light columns in the background.
3. Right panel: electric purple nightlife look. The man wears a deep purple modern suit or zip-front jacket with matching trousers, black shirt, and shiny purple dress shoes. Environment: futuristic crystalline city terrace at dusk/night, with angular transparent prism structures, holographic diamond facets, neon cyan, violet, pink and gold reflections, glossy tiled floor, and a distant illuminated skyline.

Visual style: Hyper-realistic fashion photography mixed with polished AI surrealism, vibrant saturated colors, luxury campaign aesthetic, crisp details, glossy reflective surfaces, soft cinematic lighting, sharp full-body composition, 85mm editorial feel. Color theme should be turquoise, coral red, and electric purple.

Constraints: Keep the three outfits and environments clearly distinct but harmonized as one campaign. Do not add captions, logos, watermarks, extra people, or text. Maintain exact triptych layout with three panels only.
